title: I’m thankful for ...
content:
... the ever-watching divine providence for always looks after me, strengthen me on the day of weakness, guiding me to the path of righteousness.

... the God-given wisdom so that I can make the right choices, do the right things, and ability to take care of people around me.

... my life-partner who is always there for me, with me, for better, for worse.

... all my friends who surround me with love, care, and support.

And.. I’m thankful for all disappointment which makes me appreciate all the good things I have received, and those unkind people who have came along to make me learn the importance of forgiveness.

Happy Thanksgiving, friends.
